overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic coastal desert area in a video game, approaching a modern pyramid-shaped building complex, continuing along a palm-lined beach path, and ascending stairs to an upper promenade with city views. The footage features high-fidelity game engine graphics with bright sunny lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert landscape with reddish sand and sparse vegetation. The camera moves forward toward an imposing modern pyramid-shaped building complex under a bright clear sky, with construction cranes visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to follow the building's edge, transitioning from open desert to a defined path. The beach and ocean come into view on the left while palm trees appear along the route, and the ground becomes a packed dirt trail.

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wide concrete stairs alongside other pedestrians, transitioning from the beach level to the upper promenade. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens to reveal piles of trash bags, a distant ferris wheel, and an expansive view of the ocean and city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate desert expanse toward an elevated urban promenade overlooking a coastal city. It begins by moving across reddish sands and sparse vegetation toward an imposing modern pyramid complex and distant construction cranes under a clear sky. As the camera turns left to follow the building's edge, the open desert transitions into a packed dirt trail where palm trees emerge and the ocean comes into view. The scene then shifts along this active coastal path, passing pedestrians and glancing toward a distant skyline before approaching a wide concrete stairway. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs to the upper promenade, where the view opens up to reveal piles of trash bags, a distant ferris wheel, and an expansive vista of the ocean and city.
